title: Visiones
overview: Esteban is a playboy who is dedicated to seducing women, making them fall in love and then abandoning them, but beforehand, without their realizing it, he leaves them a brochure with the details of Marta, his partner. She pretends to be a gypsy who tells the future and who knows how to make a woman keep the man she loves, so that with the information provided by Esteban, she can easily deceive them, and pretend that it is her intervention that finally makes him come back to them.
